interactions.trigger: click attribution bar for a strategy
click Sync now on Kalshi row
click Sync now on Polymarket row
click Sync now on Manifold row
click Retry on PredictIt row (when rate-limited)
status transitions healthy → rate-limited or error
click on sidebar nav item 'Paper Trades'
click on sidebar nav item 'Data ingestion'
page mount — initial load of dashboard route
SWR periodic refresh every 30s while dashboard is mounted
click on a row in active-strategies-panel
click on a row in recent-trades-panel
click on 'View all' link in recent-trades-panel header
no paper-fills exist yet OR <1 day of portfolio history
page mount — initial load of /markets route
SWR periodic refresh every 30s while markets is mounted
pagination next/prev when table exceeds threshold
change strategy parameter (kelly-fraction, min-edge, window-hours, threshold, spread)
click running-pnl on a strategy card
new strategy .py file dropped in strategies/ directory
click status filter pill (All / Open / Closed)
click strategy filter pill (Kelly / Arb / Momentum / Fade / MM / Manual)
click column sort (Time / Qty / Entry / Exit / P&L)
30s poll refresh (only when Open filter active)
